name: vulnsignal
description: Daily dashboard for CVE publications, CVSS severity, CISA KEV, exploit references, current EPSS signals and documented LLM disclosures

scripts.test: npm run evidence:check && npm run build:pages && node --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/trend-model.test.ts && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'
scripts.check: npm run data:check && npm run lint && npm test
